old_value: {"id":"bitmap-marketplace-ssd","title":"PSBT service - listing construction","description":"Build PSBT for seller listings using rust-bitcoin. Flow: (1) fetch inscription UTXO via Bitcoin RPC, (2) construct PSBT with inscription input + payment output, (3) set SIGHASH_SINGLE | ANYONECANPAY on seller input, (4) return base64 PSBT to frontend for wallet signing, (5) validate returned signed PSBT.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-05T13:21:29Z","created_by":"alpesh","updated_at":"2026-03-05T13:21:29Z"}

{"id":"bitmap-marketplace-jaa","title":"PSBT service - buy flow completion","description":"Complete buyer-side PSBT flow: (1) fetch seller's signed PSBT from DB, (2) verify inscription UTXO still unspent via Bitcoin RPC, (3) add buyer payment inputs + inscription output + change output, (4) calculate fee using current fee rate, (5) return to frontend for buyer signing, (6) validate complete PSBT, (7) broadcast via Bitcoin RPC.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-05T13:21:30Z","created_by":"alpesh","updated_at":"2026-03-05T13:21:30Z"}

{"id":"bitmap-marketplace-7a3","title":"Mempool watcher - confirmation tracking","description":"Background tokio task polling Bitcoin RPC every 30s for pending sale txids. On confirmation: update listing status to sold, update inscription owner in DB, record sale in activity_feed, update collection floor/volume stats. Handle reorg edge cases.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-05T13:21:43Z","created_by":"alpesh","updated_at":"2026-03-05T13:21:43Z"}

{"id":"bitmap-marketplace-g3z","title":"Inscription indexer sync","description":"Background tokio task: poll local ord node for new inscriptions and ownership changes every new block (detect via Bitcoin RPC getblockcount polling or ZMQ). Upsert inscriptions and ownership into DB. Track transfer events for activity feed.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-05T13:21:43Z","created_by":"alpesh","updated_at":"2026-03-05T13:21:43Z"}

{"id":"bitmap-marketplace-ejp","title":"Listing API routes","description":"Axum routes for listing management: POST /listings (create listing, returns PSBT), POST /listings/:id/confirm (submit signed PSBT), GET /listings (browse with filters: collection, price range, status), GET /listings/:id, DELETE /listings/:id (cancel). Auth via signed message from wallet.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-05T13:21:36Z","created_by":"alpesh","updated_at":"2026-03-05T13:21:36Z"}

{"id":"bitmap-marketplace-g5m","title":"Order/Buy API routes","description":"Axum routes for buying: POST /orders (initiate buy, returns PSBT to sign), POST /orders/:id/confirm (submit buyer-signed PSBT, triggers broadcast), GET /orders/:id (status). Handle double-spend race condition with DB-level locking on listing.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-05T13:21:36Z","created_by":"alpesh","updated_at":"2026-03-05T13:21:36Z"}

{"id":"bitmap-marketplace-h9n","title":"Activity feed and stats API routes","description":"GET /activity (recent sales/listings/transfers with pagination), GET /collections/:id/stats (floor, volume_24h, sales_count, owner_count), GET /inscriptions/:id/history. Computed from activity_feed and sales tables.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-05T13:21:53Z","created_by":"alpesh","updated_at":"2026-03-05T13:21:53Z"}

{"id":"bitmap-marketplace-t09","title":"Collections and inscriptions API routes","description":"GET /inscriptions/:id, GET /inscriptions/:id/content (proxy content from ord), GET /collections, GET /collections/:id, GET /collections/:id/inscriptions. Include sat rarity, traits, floor price, volume stats.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-05T13:21:52Z","created_by":"alpesh","updated_at":"2026-03-05T13:21:52Z"}

{"id":"bitmap-marketplace-mh9","title":"Royalty enforcement service","description":"Off-chain royalty deduction in PSBT construction. When building buyer PSBT, add royalty output to creator address (% of sale price). Royalty metadata stored per collection. Applied during both direct buy and offer acceptance flows.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-05T13:22:00Z","created_by":"alpesh","updated_at":"2026-03-05T13:22:00Z"}

{"id":"bitmap-marketplace-13q","title":"Offer system","description":"POST /offers (buyer constructs offer PSBT at custom price), GET /offers?inscription_id=x (list offers), POST /offers/:id/accept (seller accepts, triggers buy flow), DELETE /offers/:id (buyer cancels). Offers expire after configurable TTL.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-05T13:21:53Z","created_by":"alpesh","updated_at":"2026-03-05T13:21:53Z"}

{"id":"bitmap-marketplace-aua","title":"PSBT service unit tests","description":"Write #[cfg(test)] unit tests for src/services/psbt.rs: build_listing_psbt (structure, value, sighash type, error cases), build_buy_psbt (2in/3out, output values, fee calculation, insufficient funds), decode/encode roundtrip. No DB or network needed.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"vashalpesh@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T01:53:13Z","created_by":"twosatsmaxi","updated_at":"2026-03-06T01:53:13Z"}

{"id":"bitmap-marketplace-tuh","title":"WebSocket event serialization tests","description":"Write #[cfg(test)] tests in src/ws/mod.rs: WsEvent serde roundtrip for all 4 variants, event_matches filter logic (no filter, inscription_id match, inscription_id no-match), WsBroadcaster send+receive.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"vashalpesh@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T01:53:14Z","created_by":"twosatsmaxi","updated_at":"2026-03-06T01:53:14Z"}

{"id":"bitmap-marketplace-9pv","title":"Royalty service tests","description":"Extend #[cfg(test)] in src/services/royalty.rs: calculate edge cases (negative bps, large price, rounding), verify_royalty_in_psbt (missing output returns error, correct output passes).","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"vashalpesh@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T01:53:16Z","created_by":"twosatsmaxi","updated_at":"2026-03-06T01:53:16Z"}

{"id":"bitmap-marketplace-6bv","title":"Route handler integration tests","description":"Write axum integration tests in tests/routes.rs using tower::ServiceExt + axum::body::Body. Build an in-memory app with a mock/stub AppState (no real DB). Test: 404 on unknown route, GET /api/listings returns JSON, WS upgrade at /ws responds 101.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"vashalpesh@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T01:53:19Z","created_by":"twosatsmaxi","updated_at":"2026-03-06T01:53:19Z"}
